title: MultiHuD
description: MultiHUD is a customizable HUD mod for Minecraft Fabric that adds Armor, Inventory,  Potion, FPS, HUD elements inspired by Lunar and Feather clients. It provides a clean and lightweight interface to display important information directly on your screen.
body:
**MultiHuD**

**Status:** Released
**Loader:** Fabric
**Supported Versions:** 1.21.x & 1.20.x

---

### **Overview**

MultiHuD is a lightweight, modular HUD enhancement mod for Minecraft Fabric, designed to give players full control over their on-screen information.

Inspired by the clean and modern interfaces of popular clients such as Feather Client and Lunar Client, MultiHuD brings a highly customizable HUD system to the Fabric ecosystem without sacrificing performance or simplicity.

Whether you're tracking your FPS during intense PvP fights, monitoring potion effects in real time, or navigating the world with precise coordinates, MultiHuD allows you to build a clean and efficient interface tailored to your playstyle.

Both 1.20.x and 1.21.x versions now share the same improvements, ensuring a consistent experience across supported versions.

Each module works independently and can be freely positioned and scaled, giving you complete control over how information appears on your screen.

---

### **Included Modules**

MultiHuD includes several essential HUD components designed to enhance gameplay while remaining lightweight and unobtrusive.

**Potion HUD**
Displays all active potion effects with their corresponding icons and remaining duration, allowing you to monitor buffs and debuffs without opening your inventory.

**FPS HUD**
Shows your current frames per second in real time so you can monitor performance during gameplay.

**Coordinates HUD**
Displays your precise X, Y, Z coordinates along with your current facing direction (North, South, East, West), making navigation easier for exploration, building, or survival gameplay.

**Armor HUD**
Provides a visual representation of your equipped armor along with durability information, helping you track when your gear needs repairing or replacing.

**Inventory HUD**
Displays a preview of your currently held item and allows quick visual access to hotbar items without distracting from gameplay.

---

### **Core Features**

**Fully Draggable Interface**
Every module can be freely dragged and positioned anywhere on your screen, allowing you to design your layout exactly the way you want.

**Independent Scaling**
Each HUD element can be resized individually. Important information can be made larger for visibility, or scaled down for a minimalist interface.

**Custom Keybind System**
Assign custom keybinds to toggle individual modules or the entire HUD instantly during gameplay.

**Clean Client-Style Design**
MultiHuD uses a modern visual style inspired by popular PvP clients, blending seamlessly with Minecraft's default interface while maintaining a polished appearance.

**Performance Focused**
Built specifically for Fabric with performance in mind. The mod is optimized to ensure minimal CPU usage and no noticeable FPS impact.

**Persistent Configuration**
All settings, module positions, and toggles are automatically saved, ensuring your HUD layout remains the same every time you launch the game.

---

### **Why MultiHuD?**

MultiHuD delivers a client-level HUD experience in a standalone Fabric mod. Instead of installing a full client just for interface improvements, you get a flexible, lightweight solution that integrates seamlessly with any Fabric modpack.

With the latest update, both 1.20.x and 1.21.x versions now include the same features, improvements, and optimizations, providing a consistent and polished experience across versions.
